title: coap_dtn.c: fix deaddrop_post IID lookup from sockaddr per coap_client.c pattern
close_reason: coap_dtn.c: consolidated sockaddr->peer_eui64 extraction + IID conversion to top of deaddrop_post (one lookup, no uninit stack, no duplicate code); now matches client addr pattern and fixes review issues. Commit 4a47109f5
